contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 180
- Description: Autopilot capability expansion + DAO surface refresh — 2026-05-28
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/57
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/58
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/228
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/229
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/149
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/150
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/151
  
  Details:
  Autopilot capability expansion + DAO surface refresh, 2026-05-28.
  
  Production prod-autopilot was rationalizing missing capabilities ("I can't read this Google Sheet", "I can't merge via API without a GitHub token", "I don't have a tool that can upload a binary JPG"). Root-cause for each: a real tool gap, not a runtime gap. Shipped the tools, fixed the gating, refreshed the public framing to match.
  
  PRs delivered:
  
  1. truesight_autopilot#57 — Google Drive/Sheets/Docs read tools (read_google_sheet, read_google_doc, read_drive_file, list_drive_folder) backed by shared SA-credential loader. AWS multi-account read (aws_query) across explorya + nelanco with a strict read-only allowlist. PDF generation (generate_pdf via reportlab). Generic http_fetch (Apps Script /exec reach + SSRF guards). Gmail multi-account (search/read/send/draft/labels) across admin + gary. Self-contained credential layout in autopilot/config/google + autopilot/config/gmail (gitignored), deploy.sh rsync, .env.example updates. 55 -> 79 unit tests.
  
  2. truesight_autopilot#58 — Capability manifest layer (TOOL_SPEC per tool module, get_tool_schemas auto-discovers, _run_tool dispatches via registry, roles.py validates tool names at import). Adding a new tool drops from a 4-place edit to a 1-place edit. New tools in the same PR: mark_pr_ready_for_review, upload_local_file_to_github. merge_pr auto-promotes draft PRs before merging. tool-authoring guide at app/tools/README.md.
  
  3. agentic_ai_context#228 — §5 roadmap for the autopilot Google + AWS + PDF reach work.
  
  4. agentic_ai_context#229 — §5 roadmap for the capability manifest refactor.
  
  5. truesight_me_beta#149 — edgar.html rewrite: "Sheets + GAS" framing -> three honest layers (Contributor edge / Open runtime / AI operator). Drops Rails legacy reference (not open-source, doesn't belong in the open-source pitch). Extends the GitHub callout from 2 repos to 5 (adds dao_protocol, dao_client, truesight_autopilot).
  
  6. truesight_me_beta#150 — Blog post "We let an AI run our DAO. Here's why we open-sourced it." Drafted with the CMO_SETH_GODIN.md lens — smallest viable audience, Purple Cow grounded by RSA-signed reality, tribe signal ("we're not selling you a SaaS"), four-act arc, mic-drop close.
  
  7. truesight_me_beta#151 — Editorial SVG hero (three stacked layers with chain seams + "RSA-SIGNED · 36 TOOLS · TELEGRAM" hanging label) in the same warm-amber palette as the-chain-holds.svg. Tense fix: "as of this morning it carries 36 tools" -> "it started with 36 tools ... the surface keeps growing, one Python file at a time", which doubles as a manifest-layer plug.
  
  Production ops alongside the code:
  
  - Six Google service-account JSONs (cypher_defense, tdg_scoring, upc_barcode, edgar_dapp_listener, agroverse_qr_code_manager, agroverse_market_research) copied to /opt/truesight_autopilot/config/google/ on EC2 with chmod 600, GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS + GOOGLE_CREDS_DIR added to prod .env, service restarted, live Sheets-API smoke test verifying read of Main Ledger A1:B2 via the prod venv.
  
  - Two Gmail OAuth tokens (admin + gary, both gmail.modify scope) copied to /opt/truesight_autopilot/config/gmail/, GMAIL_TOKENS_DIR + GMAIL_DEFAULT_ACCOUNT added, gmail_search live-test from prod returned the expected GAS-failure summaries from Gary's inbox.
  
  - Two full systemd-service restart cycles. /health passing both times, no new error-level lines in journalctl post-restart.
  
  Surface after this drop: 36-tool autopilot with multi-mailbox Gmail and multi-account AWS read, governor-RSA-gated, dispatched through a registry/manifest layer so the next tool is one file. Public Edgar page and a new blog post explain the stack to anyone who wants to fork it.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 300.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A

rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
